title: Diana Barran, Parliamentary Under Secretary of State (Minister for the School System and Student Finance), the Department for Education - ACOBA Advice
body: "Baroness Barran left her role at the Department for Education in July 2024  Special Advisor, Phoenix Court Group Baroness Barran sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Phonenix Court Group. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up in March 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
